title: copper golem mod
description: Adds the copper golem from the Minecraft mob vote in 2021
body:
⚙️ Copper Golem Mod

Bring the Copper Golem from the 2021 Minecraft Mob Vote into your world! This mod introduces unique new features and interactive gameplay elements centered around the versatile copper material.

🛡️ Key Features:

Copper Golem Mob: Spawn your own Copper Golem by stacking a copper block, a carved pumpkin, and placing a lightning rod on top. Watch it come alive and interact dynamically with your environment.

Copper Cities: Discover and explore naturally generating cities made entirely of copper in plains biomes. These visually striking settlements offer new places to explore, loot, and build upon.

Copper Beds: Introduce a challenging twist with the new Copper Bed. Beware—lying down causes damage, adding a quirky element of surprise and risk to your adventures.

🌟 Why Use This Mod?

This mod brings the excitement and innovation of Minecraft's mob vote directly into your hands, enhancing exploration, creativity, and survival gameplay. Ideal for players who enjoy interactive mobs, exploration, and unique gameplay mechanics.

📖 Compatibility and Installation:

Built for seamless integration with existing worlds and modpacks. Simply install using Fabric Loader and dive into your next copper-infused adventure!
